channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

From The Athletic FC: The price of watching live sport in the U.S. has ballooned — and the World Cup is taking full advantage of the landscape. “In chasing maximum revenue, FIFA risks shrinking the very audience that made the World Cup seemingly priceless - facebook.com
